# PERF-062 positive: c.Param parsed with regexp inside a middleware
lang: go
file: PERF-062-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"regexp"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var idPattern = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-f0-9]{32}$`)

func MiddlewareIDCheck(c *gin.Context) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	if !idPattern.MatchString(id) {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	c.Next()
}
